steps.title: Track the time shift
steps.content: The first sentence describes the museum before it opened a massive new gallery in 2009, when it could display only about 5% of its collection. The second sentence shifts to the museum's current display capacity.

steps.title: Mark the present contrast
steps.content: Choice A adds information, Choice B gives an example, and Choice C signals contrast without indicating the time shift. The needed transition moves from the earlier period before 2009 to the present. The answer is D.
